branch.frontier_task_title: v6.8 frontier: executable quality ledger foundation
branch.branch_summary: Implement TASK-078 v6.8 Executable Quality Ledger foundation: add the smallest canonical quality-ledger event schema, writer, audit, and negative fixtures that detect missing runtime evidence or contradicted claims. Stop condition: foundation only; do not auto-compute QIF verdicts and do not claim operator validation. QIF boundary: ledger presence is evidence traceability, not semantic truth.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-078 sits on v6.8 after shipped v6.7.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Advance v6.8 Executable Quality Ledger: make QIF-relevant evidence changes appendable and auditable, so corrected assumptions, contradicted claims, and missing runtime evidence are visible before future review or release decisions.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-078: v6.8 frontier: executable quality ledger foundation
